race.comment: GRAND PRAIRIE (15) Group 3 winner ready to peak third-up. Never on the track last start with the 60kg when a fighting second over 1150m at Randwick Kensington. Stalks the fast tempo and looks hard to hold out. SHIRVINGTON (12) Springtime winner last September, ready for the 1200m. Slow into stride from a poor draw and unsuited in a fast run contest with a dismal ninth over 1000m at Warwick Farm. Expected to bounce back quickly with the 55.5kg over his pet trip. ESTREMO (11) Group 3 winner in the Spring resuming. Primed for this with the two trials and look for him launching out wide. Each-way. OUR QUEEN (14) caught the eye second-up with an encouraging fourth over 1400m at Rosehill in this class. Can race closer from the awkward gate and take a hand in the finish. BANDI'S BOY (8) frustrating gelding who drops in weight from a decent gate. Worth thought.
